title: Experience Bar Health Indicator
description: This mod utilizes the Minecraft experience bar & level text, to display the HP of entities that you are looking at (toggleable).
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Experience Bar Health Indicator** is a client-sided only Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that utilizes the Minecraft **experience bar & level text**, to display the health of targeted (looked at) entities. When you look at an entity, the value of your EXP bar and level text get set to the health of the entity. Once you look away from the entity, the EXP values **return back to how they really are**. The whole mod is toggleable with this command that the mod adds: **/togglexpbarhpindicator**.

For a visual of the mod, please visit this mod's **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/experience-bar-health-indicator/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Why Download?**

Knowing the health of your enemies is a good thing to know, as **you will know when they will die**.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate **[here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov)** (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
